targets.query:
from(bucket: "f1_telemetry_raw")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lap_history")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["session_uid"] == "${session}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["driver_name"] == "${driver}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lap_time" or r["_field"] == "sector1_time" or r["_field"] == "sector2_time" or r["_field"] == "sector3_time")
  |> group(columns: ["lap_num", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey:["lap_num"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ "Vuelta": int(v: r.lap_num), "Tiempo de Vuelta": r.lap_time, "Sector 1": r.sector1_time, "Sector 2": r.sector2_time, "Sector 3": r.sector3_time }))
  |> keep(columns: ["Vuelta", "Tiempo de Vuelta", "Sector 1", "Sector 2", "Sector 3"])
  |> sort(columns: ["Vuelta"])

from(bucket: "f1_telemetry_raw")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "lap_history")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["session_uid"] == "${session}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["driver_name"] == "${driver}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lap_time")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "f1_telemetry_raw")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "telemetry_fast")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["session_uid"] == "${session}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["driver_name"] == "${driver}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] =~ /tyre_temp_surf_/)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

list.definition:
from(bucket: "f1_telemetry_raw")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "telemetry_fast")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "session_uid"])
  |> group(columns: ["session_uid"])
  |> last(column: "_time")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: string(v: r._time) + " - Carrera (" + r.session_uid + ")" }))
list.label: Sesión
list.name: session
